step1.title: Upload an Image
step1.desc: Upload a portrait, pet, or illustration. The site resizes and maps colors in the browser.

step2.title: Generate Draft
step2.desc: Compress to a fixed grid based on board size and map to the bead color palette to create an editable draft.

step3.title: Fine-tune
step3.desc: Adjust colors cell by cell, erase noise, and check the count of each color used.

gallery.title: Recent Saved Works
gallery.desc: Reading directly from local JSON data to get the editor and sharing pipeline running.
gallery.empty: No works yet. Generate and save one in the editor above.

HeroExperience.title: From upload to share — pick a stage on the left, see the result change on the right.
HeroExperience.desc: The feature is split into 4 product cards; each step highlights a key area in the preview.

upload.title: Upload
upload.summary: Drop in the original image and get a convertible input instantly.
upload.detail: Works with portraits, pets, or illustrations. Start with a clean reference image.

quantize.title: Quantize
quantize.summary: Automatically compress to a limited palette and fixed grid.
quantize.detail: Turns image relationships into a bead-ready draft without manual tracing.

edit.title: Edit
edit.summary: Adjust colors cell by cell, clear noise and edges.
edit.detail: Fine-tune the generated result — much faster than starting from a blank board.

share.title: Share
share.summary: Organize your work into browsable template pages.
share.detail: Once accounts and cloud storage are connected, build a lasting library of works.

HeroShowcase.title: The {stage} stage is highlighted in the preview.
HeroShowcase.desc: Switch workflow stages on the left; the right will emphasize the original, mapping, edit, or sharing result.

BeadStudio.title: Upload an image, generate an editable bead pattern in seconds
BeadStudio.desc: This MVP covers single-image conversion, grid painting, and local pattern saving. Comments, favorites, and collaboration come next.

canvas.hint: Upload an image and click "Generate Bead Pattern" — the blank grid will fill automatically.

stats.title: Usage Stats
stats.empty: After generating a pattern, the count for each color will appear here.

messages.noImage: The original image will appear here after uploading.
messages.defaultHint: After generating, you can paint directly on the grid on the right.
messages.errNoImageUpload: Please upload an image before generating a bead pattern.
messages.errSave: Save failed, please try again later.

TemplatesPage.title: Recent Saved Works
TemplatesPage.desc: Reading directly from local JSON data to get the editor and sharing pipeline running.
TemplatesPage.empty: No works yet. Go to the <editorLink>Editor</editorLink> to generate and save one.
